objective.primary_goal: Validate Sekolah Rakyat blueprint features against empirically derived learning barrier severity rankings
objective.design_principle: Analysis layer only — no model evolution, no taxonomy redesign

key_insights: System stability (TB-4) is the primary blocking factor for all learning processes
Curriculum mismatch (TB-7) is second-order structural issue
Adaptive learning features depend on stability + curriculum correctness layers
Engagement and AI support are downstream optimizations, not core prerequisites

feature_prioritization_matrix.interpretation: Core system failures directly block learning process (login, crash, lag)
feature_prioritization_matrix.validation_note: Confirms SR system layer must exist before any adaptive intelligence layer

feature_prioritization_matrix.interpretation: Instructional misalignment is structural learning failure
feature_prioritization_matrix.validation_note: Confirms need for structured learning path before personalization

feature_prioritization_matrix.interpretation: High frequency but low negativity indicates mixed learning success
